title: platostoma chinense
intro: Platostoma chinense, also known as Chinese mint or Chinese basil, is a type of perennial plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Platostoma chinense include its ability to soothe digestive problems, relieve stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Platostoma chinense are often made into teas, infusions, or used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal tonics and remedies.
